Interface GTNetMessageHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAnnouncementHandler, AbstractDataRequestAcceptHandler, AbstractDataRequestHandler, AbstractDataRevokeHandler, AbstractGTNetMessageHandler, AbstractRequestHandler, AbstractResponseHandler, AdminMessageAnnouncementHandler, DataRequestAcceptHandler, DataRequestHandler, DataRequestRejectedHandler, DataRevokeHandler, ExchangeSyncHandler, FirstHandshakeRequestHandler, HistoryquoteExchangeHandler, HistoryquotePushAckHandler, HistoryquotePushHandler, LastpriceExchangeHandler, LastpricePushHandler, MaintenanceAnnouncementHandler, OfflineAnnouncementHandler, OperationDiscontinuedHandler, PingMessageHandler, SecurityBatchLookupHandler, SecurityLookupHandler, ServerlistResponseHandler, ServerlistRevokeHandler, SettingsUpdatedAnnouncementHandler, TokenRefreshRequestHandler, UpdateServerlistRequestHandler
public interface GTNetMessageHandler
Strategy interface for handling GTNet messages. Each implementation handles one or more message code types. Implementations are auto-discovered by Spring and registered in the handler registry.

Implementation Guidelines

  • Annotate implementations with @Component for Spring auto-discovery
  • Extend AbstractGTNetMessageHandler for common functionality
  • For request handlers, extend AbstractRequestHandler which integrates auto-response logic
  • For announcement handlers, extend AbstractAnnouncementHandler
  • Override getSupportedMessageCodes() to handle multiple related message codes in one handler
See Also:
  • for handler lookup
  • for possible return types

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MessageCategory
    getCategory()
    Returns the category of messages this handler processes.
    GTNetMessageCode
    getSupportedMessageCode()
    Returns the primary message code this handler is responsible for.
    default Set<? extends GTNetMessageCode>
    getSupportedMessageCodes()
    Returns all message codes this handler can process.
    HandlerResult<GTNetMessage, MessageEnvelope>
    handle(GTNetMessageContext context)
    Handles the incoming message and returns a result indicating the outcome.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      HandlerResult<GTNetMessage, MessageEnvelope> handle(GTNetMessageContext context) throws Exception
      Handles the incoming message and returns a result indicating the outcome.
      Parameters:
      context - the message context containing request data and utilities
      Returns:
      the handler result indicating response type or error
      Throws:
      Exception - if processing fails unexpectedly

    • getSupportedMessageCode

      GTNetMessageCode getSupportedMessageCode()
      Returns the primary message code this handler is responsible for. For handlers supporting multiple codes, this returns the first/primary code. Override getSupportedMessageCodes() to register all supported codes.

    • getSupportedMessageCodes

      default Set<? extends GTNetMessageCode> getSupportedMessageCodes()
      Returns all message codes this handler can process. Override this method to handle multiple related message codes in a single handler. The default implementation returns only the single code from getSupportedMessageCode().
      Returns:
      set of supported message codes

    • getCategory

      MessageCategory getCategory()
      Returns the category of messages this handler processes. Used for validation and to determine expected response behavior.
